name: Duct Sizing Calculator
seo_title: HVAC Duct Sizing – Pressure Drop Method
seo_description: Calculate velocidad_ms, diametro_mm with our free hvac duct sizing calculator. Just enter caudal_m3h, perdida_carga_pa_m and get results instantly.
example_label: Calculate duct size for 0.8 m3/s airflow at 4 m/s velocity.

range_hints.caudal_m3h: Design airflow. Branch: 50-300 m³/h, Main: 500-5000 m³/h
range_hints.perdida_carga_pa_m: Low velocity: 0.5-1.0 Pa/m, Standard: 1.0-2.0 Pa/m, Industrial: 2.0-5.0 Pa/m

result_context: Conducto with loss constante: speed of {velocidad_ms} m/s, diameter normalizado of {diametro_mm} mm, cross-section of {area_m2} m².
formula_display: Método of igual fricción. v ≈ f(ΔP, ρ). D = √(4Q/πv). Normalizado a diámetros comerciales.
steps: To 1.5 Pa/m with ρ=1.2 kg/m³, estimate speed ≈ 3.8 m/s
mistakes: Use the same loss of carga in all the tramos — in branches allow losses mayores
Not considering the rugosidad of the material — conductos flexibl is tienen more loss that chapa lisa
Forget the recovery estática in derivaciones
description: HVAC duct sizing based on airflow and velocity.
rc: A {longitud_pica} m grounding rod in {resistividad} Ω·m soil giv is approximately {resistencia} Ω of earth resistance.
fd: R = ρ ÷ (2πL) × ln(4L/d); Multiple rods: Rtotal ≈ R ÷ (n × 0.8)
el: Ground rod calculation for clay soil with a 2 m rod
desc: HVAC Duct Sizing Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
